name: add_comment
description: Add a comment or story to an existing task for team collaboration and communication.

parameters.name: task_gid
parameters.description: The GID of the task to add a comment to (path parameter).

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The comment text to add to the task.
parameters.example: Completed the initial OAuth2 implementation. Ready for review.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of story (usually 'comment' for user-created comments).

data.text: Completed the initial OAuth2 implementation. Ready for review.
Completed the initial OAuth2 implementation. Ready for review.
